title: Wire Argo Events webhook trigger for pose-detection (eventsource entry + sensor)
description:
Wire push-to-main triggering for pose-detection-build, following the palm-reading pattern in jedarden/declarative-config k8s/iad-ci/argo-events/.

1. Add a pose-detection entry to github-eventsource.yml (EventSource github-webhooks, ns argo-events): owner jedarden, names [pose-detection], webhook endpoint /pose-detection, port 12000, url https://webhooks-ci.ardenone.com, events [push], apiToken+webhookSecret from github-webhook-secret (keys token / webhook-secret), insecure false, active true, contentType json. The controller auto-creates the GitHub webhook on the repo via the apiToken.
2. Create pose-detection-sensor.yml modeled on palm-reading-sensor.yml: Sensor pose-detection-sensor in argo-events ns; dependency eventSourceName github-webhooks / eventName pose-detection; filters: headers.X-Github-Event == push, body.ref == refs/heads/main, plus auto-bump cascade guard (replicate palm filter; the build commits as user jedarden with message prefix ci: auto-bump — prefer a message-based exclusion if comparator supports it, and verify no infinite build loop after first triggered run). Trigger: argoWorkflow submit, generateName pose-detection-build-, workflowTemplateRef pose-detection-build, params git-repo=jedarden/pose-detection branch=main.

Acceptance criteria:
1. Both files committed+pushed; argo-events app on iad-ci syncs
2. kubectl --kubeconfig=/home/coding/.kube/iad-ci.kubeconfig get sensor pose-detection-sensor -n argo-events exists
3. GitHub webhook appears on jedarden/pose-detection (gh api repos/jedarden/pose-detection/hooks)
4. A push to main produces a Workflow run

title: Verify pose-detection Argo CI green end-to-end (manual run + gait.jedarden.com deploy confirmation)
description:
Verification gate before GitHub Actions removal.

Steps:
1. Submit manual run: kubectl --kubeconfig=/home/coding/.kube/iad-ci.kubeconfig create -f - with kind Workflow, generateName pose-detection-build-manual-, ns argo-workflows, workflowTemplateRef pose-detection-build, serviceAccountName argo-workflow
2. Watch to Succeeded (podGC OnPodCompletion — stream logs WHILE running if debugging; failure logs only kept 2h in Argo UI at https://argo-ci.ardenone.com)
3. Confirm test step ran lint+tests and passed (this replaces the old GH ci.yml coverage)
4. Confirm new semver tag on docker.io/ronaldraygun/gait-detection (Docker Hub)
5. Confirm declarative-config commit pinned k8s/apexalgo-iad/gait/gait-detection-deployment.yml to the new semver, ArgoCD app gait-ns-apexalgo-iad Synced+Healthy (curl -sk https://argocd-ro-ardenone-manager-ts.ardenone.com:8444/api/v1/applications/gait-ns-apexalgo-iad), pod in ns gait on apexalgo-iad runs new image (kubectl --server=http://traefik-apexalgo-iad:8001 get pods -n gait)
6. Confirm https://gait.jedarden.com serves (curl -sI; ADB phone Chrome fallback if blocked)

Acceptance: all checks pass; record workflow name + image tag in close note (close via br batch --json, not br close).

title: Author Argo WorkflowTemplate pose-detection-build in declarative-config (ronaldraygun/gait-detection image)
description:
Create k8s/iad-ci/argo-workflows/pose-detection-build-workflowtemplate.yml in jedarden/declarative-config (clone at ~/declarative-config; git pull --rebase before touching, push immediately after commit).

Model on palm-reading-build-workflowtemplate.yml. IMPORTANT naming quirk: the repo is jedarden/pose-detection but the production image/deployment is gait-detection (live site gait.jedarden.com runs ronaldraygun/gait-detection:0.1.3 in namespace gait on apexalgo-iad). Keep template name pose-detection-build (matches repo), image name gait-detection (matches deployment).

Steps: test -> resolve-version -> docker-build (kaniko) -> update-declarative-config.
- test step (replaces the old GH Actions ci.yml test job): node:20-alpine (pin a specific tag/digest, not :latest), clone repo, npm ci && npm run lint && npm test && npm run build. activeDeadlineSeconds ~900, resources ~2Gi/1cpu. The old GH matrix tested node 18+20; a single node 20 run is sufficient
- Params: git-repo=jedarden/pose-detection, branch=main
- resolve-version: VERSION file does NOT exist in repo; initialize at 0.1.4 (deployed image is 0.1.3) and commit per palm-reading else-branch pattern. Git identity user.email github@jedarden.com / user.name jedarden; GH_TOKEN from secret github-webhook-secret key token
- kaniko: Dockerfile at repo root, context git://github.com/REPO.git#refs/heads/BRANCH, destinations docker.io/ronaldraygun/gait-detection:VERSION + :latest, --cache=true --cache-repo=ronaldraygun/cache, mount docker-hub-registry secret as /kaniko/.docker exactly like palm-reading. Pin kaniko executor to a version tag (e.g. v1.23.2), not :latest
- update-declarative-config: sed image tag in k8s/apexalgo-iad/gait/gait-detection-deployment.yml (ronaldraygun/gait-detection:0.1.3 -> new semver), commit+push with same git identity

Acceptance criteria:
1. File committed+pushed to declarative-config main
2. kubectl --kubeconfig=/home/coding/.kube/iad-ci.kubeconfig get workflowtemplate pose-detection-build -n argo-workflows succeeds

comments.author: cli
comments.text: HEADS-UP from migration setup (2026-06-10): npm run lint currently FAILS on main — verified by GH Actions run triggered today (Run linter step failed on node 18 and 20; the repo's only previous CI run in July 2025 also failed the same way). Options for the test step: (a) fix the lint errors first in a separate commit, or (b) gate the template's test step on npm test + npm run build only and add lint back once fixed. Do NOT ship a template whose test step is red on day one — that would block every build including the verification bead.

title: Remove .github/workflows from pose-detection after Argo CI verified green
description:
ONLY after the verification bead is closed green. Delete .github/workflows/ci.yml from jedarden/pose-detection (git rm; remove empty .github/workflows dir). GH Actions are policy-banned in this workspace. The old ci.yml ran lint/test/coverage/build on node 18+20 plus a no-push docker build; the Argo pose-detection-build template test step replaces it (single node 20 run). Commit on main with identity github@jedarden.com/jedarden, message like: ci: remove GitHub Actions (migrated to Argo Workflows pose-detection-build on iad-ci). Push.

Acceptance: .github/workflows/ absent on origin/main; no new GH Actions runs; Argo sensor is the only CI trigger.
